name: Northern Potash Co.
summary: Northern Potash Co., a junior resource company, engages in the identification, acquisition, and exploration of Potash properties in the former Soviet Union and Canada. The company has access to Potash and Phosphate properties in the Soviet Union and Canada. The company was formerly known as INREEX, Inc. and changed its name to Northern Potash Co. in July 2008. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Moscow, Russia.
